---
name: Documentation update
about: Suggest improvements, corrections, or missing parts in the documentation
title: "[DOCUMENTATION] <Documentation Update Title>"
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
type: Task

---

**Documentation Link**
Provide a link to the existing page or file that needs updating (if applicable).

**Description of the Issue**
A clear and concise description of what is wrong or missing. 
(e.g., outdated installation commands, broken links, typo, confusing explanation)

**Proposed Changes**
Describe the specific updates you would like to see made to the documentation.

**Target Audience**
Who benefits from this change? 
* [ ] Beginners / New Contributors
* [ ] Advanced Users / Developers
* [ ] API Integrators

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or code snippets here.
